name: Fleet Ops Console
description: Internal admin shell for an SRE fleet-ops tool. Compares a data-dense table-first console against a card-driven incident-first console, across light/dark themes and sidebar/top-nav layouts.

choices.name: overview
choices.description: Fleet at a glance — KPIs and host list.

axes.name: variant
axes.description: Information density and content priority. Only meaningful on overview; secondary pages use 'none'.

choices.name: none
choices.description: No variant treatment; used for pages where density is fixed.

choices.name: data-dense
choices.description: Wide tabular layout. Optimized for engineers who already know what they're looking for.

choices.name: card-driven
choices.description: Incident-first cards with status accents. Optimized for triage during an active page.

choices.name: light
choices.description: Daytime palette. Higher information density relies on stronger row dividers.

choices.name: dark
choices.description: On-call palette. Status colors carry the saturation, chrome stays muted.

choices.name: sidebar
choices.description: Persistent left rail with primary nav and tenant switcher.

choices.name: top-nav
choices.description: Horizontal nav with breadcrumb-driven page switching.

pages.description: Default landing experience: dense table on a left-rail shell.
On-call mode of the dense console.
Same dense console without the persistent rail.
Incident-first cards on the rail layout.
Card-driven console in dark; the variation we'd actually look at during a page.
Card-driven console with horizontal nav, dark.
